name: Cranberry-Pumpkin Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine the allspice, whole wheat flour, sugar, cinnamon, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and butter. Stir until well mixed.
3. Add pumpkin puree and eggs to the dry ingredients. Mix until just combined.
4. Fold in the cranberries.
5. Spoon the batter into 24 greased muffin cups.
6. Place the muffin tins in the hot oven.
7. Bake for 40 minutes, or until a tester inserted in the center comes out clean.
